falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Operator endpoint read hotspots are actually core-path failures
falsificationQueries: Compare core run progression via bounded health APIs during lab/getStuckWork instability
Verify whether core completion can proceed with operator endpoint degradation
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Core progression and eventual completion were still achievable through bounded operational sources, while heavy operator endpoints remained unstable. This supports separate-class handling.
